title: Stand 2 motor overheating during high load campaign
summary: Temperature rose with elevated vibration after consecutive rolling sequences.
root_cause: Dry bearing lubrication and coupling insert wear caused heat rise under load. AI4I heat-dissipation-style signature matched high process temperature and tool wear.
action_taken: Re-greased bearings replaced coupling insert aligned motor base and monitored current for two shifts.

title: Cooling pump low flow event
summary: Flow dropped while suction pressure fluctuated after upstream strainer maintenance.
root_cause: Partial strainer blockage and suction-side air ingress. Mapped AI4I power-failure-style torque/speed imbalance indicated pump load instability.
action_taken: Cleaned strainer tightened suction flange vented pump casing and verified flow recovery.

title: Conveyor gearbox oil contamination
summary: Oil particle count crossed alert level after dusty shift and inspection cover opening.
root_cause: Dust ingress through worn inspection cover gasket. AI4I tool-wear-style signal suggested abrasive wear progression.
action_taken: Changed oil replaced gasket cleaned breather and scheduled ferrography sample.
